economic_ownership_map.label: Subscription software owner-cash engine (AutoCAD, Revit, Fusion, AEC/MFG)
economic_ownership_map.ownership_claim: Global design/engineering subscription normalized free cash flow

low.label: FY2026 net cash provided by operating activities
FY2026 payments to acquire property and equipment
Normalized owner free cash flow per diluted share
low.rationale: FY2026 operating cash flow less capital spending per diluted share; subscription model transition largely complete.

low.label: Growth years 1–5
low.rationale: Lawrence bear/base/bull owner-cash growth; FY2026 revenue +18% YoY supports base.

low.label: Growth years 6–7
low.rationale: Fade after construction-cloud and AI monetization normalize.

low.label: Required return on owner cash
low.rationale: Premium SaaS compounder bounds; not the stance gate.

low.label: Selling multiple in year 7
low.rationale: Lawrence exit multiples 20× / 26× / 30× on year-7 cash path.

low.label: Component schedule adjustment factor
low.rationale: Preserves component schedule while filing facts anchor FY2026 FCF per share.

low.label: cash_pv
low.formula: present_value(owner_cash_y1, 1, owner_cash_y2, 2, owner_cash_y3, 3, owner_cash_y4, 4, owner_cash_y5, 5, owner_cash_y6, 6, discount_rate)

economic_ownership_map.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Subscription transition largely complete; FY2026 revenue +18% YoY.
economic_ownership_map.falsifier: Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.

probability_and_timing.timing_basis: RPO converts over 1–3 year subscription terms per FY2026 10-K.
probability_and_timing.probability_basis: Base ~40% that construction cloud ARPU uplift sustains mid-single-digit billings growth.
probability_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: Capital-light SaaS; incremental cloud capex minimal vs OCF.

economic_ownership_map.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Not in Lawrence base FCF path; RPO $8.3B supports conversion timing.
economic_ownership_map.falsifier: Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.

economic_ownership_map.label: Net cash and debt claims on common equity
economic_ownership_map.ownership_claim: Net corporate liquidity after long-term debt and operating minimum

low.label: Cash required for payroll and working capital
low.rationale: Judgment on non-distributable operating liquidity for global SaaS operations.

low.label: Net financial claim on common equity after debt and operating minimum
low.rationale: Q1 FY2027 filing-locked cash less long-term debt; low stresses trapped liquidity.

base.label: Cash required for payroll and working capital
base.rationale: Judgment on non-distributable operating liquidity for global SaaS operations.

base.label: Net financial claim on common equity after debt and operating minimum
base.rationale: Q1 FY2027 filing-locked cash less long-term debt; low stresses trapped liquidity.

high.label: Cash required for payroll and working capital

high.label: Net financial claim on common equity after debt and operating minimum
high.rationale: Q1 FY2027 filing-locked cash less long-term debt; low stresses trapped liquidity.

method_route.label: High-return compounder
failure_modes: growth projected without its capital cost
terminal value unsupported by a durable mechanism
method_route.decision_rule: Power Zones select the fitting economic method and eligible independent reviewers; they never choose the valuation answer or capital decision.

valuation.interpretation: value_per_share is withheld while any material additive component is unpriced; priced_components_per_share is not a complete security value.

scenario_contract.rule: Cases must change cited causal operating, capital, probability, timing, or financing drivers—not only a terminal multiple.

top_value_drivers.label: Subscription software owner-cash engine (AutoCAD, Revit, Fusion, AEC/MFG)
Subscription transition, competition, and dilution stress reserve
Construction cloud, Forma, and AI-assisted design upside option
Net cash and debt claims on common equity

falsifiers: Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.

Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.
required_refresh_triggers: new filing or material operating update

change_control.rule: A source fact is locked. Every assumption change requires a reason, author, timestamp, and before/after value.

decision_rule: No security is decision-grade until every material claim is valued exactly once by a valid calculation proof and every material evidence blocker is resolved.
